Find sources: "2017 in Legacy Fighting Alliance" – news · newspapers · books · scholar · JSTOR (February 2018) (Learn how and when to remove this message)
2017 in Legacy Fighting Alliance
Information
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
First date airedJanuary 13, 2017 (2017-01-13)
Last date airedDecember 15, 2017 (2017-12-15)
2018 →

2017 was the first year in the history of Legacy Fighting Alliance, a mixed martial arts promotion based in the United States.

Event list

[edit]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 1: Peterson vs. Higo

[edit]
Legacy Fighting Alliance 1: Peterson vs. Higo
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 13, 2017
VenueThe Bomb Factory
CityDallas, Texas, U.S.
Event chronology
Inaugurated Legacy Fighting Alliance 1: Peterson vs. Higo Legacy Fighting Alliance 2: Richman vs Stojadinovic

Legacy Fighting Alliance 1: Peterson vs. Higo was the inaugural event of Legacy Fighting Alliance and took place on January 13, 2017 after the merger of Legacy Fighting Championship and Resurrection Fighting Alliance. It aired on AXS TV.

Results

Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Bantamweight Leandro Higo def. Steven Peterson Decision (unanimous) 5 5:00 [a]
Featherweight Damon Jackson def. Charles Cheeks III Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 1:24
Bantamweight Eli Tamez def. Ulyses Aguila Decision (split) 3 5:00
Women's Strawweight Cynthia Calvillo def. Montana De La Rosa TKO (punches) 3 2:54
Catchweight (130 lbs) Cameron Miller def. Oscar Ramirez Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 0:29
Welterweight Sean Holden def. Armando Servin Decision (split) 3 5:00
Featherweight Bobby Butler def. Jessie Vasquez Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:36
Preliminary Card
Lightweight Victor Oreamuno def. Jesse Nelson TKO (punches) 3 1:55
Featherweight Fernando Salas def. Josh Nealy Submission (armbar) 1 1:00
Amateur Bouts
Flyweight Victor Altamirano def. Marvincent Williams Submission (triangle choke) 2 0:48
Featherweight Kenneth Gross def. Elijah Johns TKO (punches) 2 1:44
Bantamweight Alex Mejia def. Anthony Gaut Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 2:20
Lightweight Austin Henry def. Victor Pasqual Submission (rear-naked choke) 3 2:50
Flyweight Steven Orozco def. Ricardo Martinez Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Postliminary Card
Featherweight Charles Williams def. Austin Lingo TKO (punches) 1 0:18 [b]
Heavyweight Rashad Coulter def. Larry Hopkins KO (punches) 1 0:38
  1. ^ For the inaugural LFA Bantamweight Championship.
  2. ^ Amateur bout
